datasets.snapshot: mutable daily non-commercial export retrieved and frozen on 2026-07-22
datasets.transform: Build the frozen title-person bipartite graph with one positive unit edge per title.principals row and dense 1-based identifiers.
datasets.queries: Secondary <g,f> queries use the MonoGST+ Gaussian-size and uniform-vertex protocol; they do not use IMDb labels.
datasets.comparability_note: This is a current official IMDb freeze for sensitivity analysis, not the unavailable PrunedDP++ 2016 snapshot.
